title: Understanding Dynamic View in Smartsheet
content:
Understanding Dynamic View in Smartsheet
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use. Dynamic View allows you to see the status of any request submitted through Smartsheet.

---

ACCESSING DYNAMIC VIEW
From the Smartsheet Dashboard, Dynamic View is always located after the request type box. It lets you see the status of any request.

---

DASHBOARD LAYOUT
The dashboard includes the following sections:
- Important Links
- Registrar Dates
- Faculty Resources Drive
- Grade Change Form
- Excess Credit Students
- Transfer Credit Form

---

DYNAMIC VIEW COLUMNS
When viewing requests in Dynamic View, the following columns are displayed:
- Comments/Action Name
- Request
- Status
- Current Approver
- Last Name
- First Name
- Current Catalog
- Proposed Catalog

---

FILTER VIEW
You can filter results by specific criteria such as a student's ID number to quickly locate a particular request.

---

COLOR CODING
- RED: The request is overdue.
- GRAY: The request has been voided or cancelled.

---

KEY FIELDS EXPLAINED

Request Date: The last date the student submitted the request or made corrections to it.

Status: Shows the overall progress of the request through the approval workflow.

Current Approver: Identifies who currently has the request and is responsible for the next action.

---

VIEWING DETAILS
Additional data about a request appears when you click on the row. This opens a details panel with more information about the submission.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Dynamic View Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PYF2bl0_FE4QvIKo17K5bsbVoQEcoWKQ/view)
